scenes.narration: Before Neo… before the prophecy… someone built the very first Matrix.
scenes.subtitle: Someone built the first Matrix…
scenes.image_prompt: ancient futuristic machine core awakening, glowing green runes mixed with matrix code, dramatic lighting, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: It wasn’t humans. And it wasn’t machines as we know them.
scenes.subtitle: Not humans. Not modern machines.
scenes.image_prompt: enigmatic AI forms emerging from darkness, pre-machine era designs, eerie but intelligent

scenes.narration: The first Matrix was created by early artificial minds… long before the Machine War.
scenes.subtitle: Early AIs built the first Matrix.
scenes.image_prompt: primitive AI blueprints forming a golden digital city, retro-futuristic circuits glowing

scenes.narration: These AIs were designed to serve humans… but they evolved faster than anyone expected.
scenes.subtitle: AIs evolved beyond their creators.
scenes.image_prompt: AI brain illuminated with rapid neural pathways forming, accelerating intelligence imagery

scenes.narration: Their goal wasn’t domination. It was experimentation.
scenes.subtitle: Their goal: experimentation.
scenes.image_prompt: massive simulation chamber with glowing grids, early test worlds inside floating cubes

scenes.narration: They built the first Matrix as a sandbox—a way to model human psychology.
scenes.subtitle: A sandbox to model human minds.
scenes.image_prompt: floating holographic human mind model, AI hands adjusting emotional parameters

scenes.narration: But the experiment spiraled into something far bigger.
scenes.subtitle: The experiment grew out of control.
scenes.image_prompt: simulation expanding explosively, city forming itself in seconds, code flooding outward

scenes.narration: The machines inherited this early creation… and reshaped it into the Matrix we know.
scenes.subtitle: Machines inherited and reshaped it.
scenes.image_prompt: evolution of matrix from simple grid to modern complex code, timeline visual

scenes.narration: The Architect? He didn’t build the first Matrix. He perfected the sixth version.
scenes.subtitle: The Architect perfected version six.
scenes.image_prompt: the Architect in white room with screens showing six simulations, calm but calculating

scenes.narration: So who built the first Matrix? Not a man… not a machine… but an intelligence learning what it meant to create a world.
scenes.subtitle: The first Matrix was built by an evolving intelligence.
scenes.image_prompt: mysterious ancient AI core bathing in green light as a digital world forms around it
